name: Apple Cider Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut apple slices crosswise into half.
2. Mix sugar, cornstarch, and pumpkin pie spice in a 2-quart saucepan; stir until well combined.
3. Stir in apple cider and lemon juice. Heat to boiling.
4. Boil for 5 minutes, stirring frequently (the mixture will be slightly thickened).
5. Add the apples and continue heating until boiling.
6. Boil for an additional 1-2 minutes or until the apples are crisp-tender; remove from heat.
7. Stir in butter or margarine.
8. Cool slightly and serve warm.
